title: August 22nd, 2022
body:
lyrics

alone like acey
gray like macy
king like stacey
and i count like basie
so another name ain't about to bout face me
see me coming, you about to face me
you can come in, be bout it, and face it
or turn around, i'll battle ya shadow, it don't phase me
my mutant superpowers include phasing
projection and transformation
the phase i'm in defies explanation
the way i've been beyond exploration
the pay i get for my contributions
may not feed me yet but i see the movement
when i step so i will keep doing
what i see when i'm in the presence
of god watching me like i an my consequences
y'all watching me but my amps all the feedback
